title: activity — compliance evidence
description: Activity is the PRODUCT feed — not the compliance evidence trail. That's audit. Regulators would look at audit rows, not activity. But activity is still a useful operational trail per SOC 2 CC7.3.

controls.evidence: Tier-based retention (30/90/365d) prunes rows past window. Free plan has shortest window.
AnonymiseActivityForErasedUser listener replaces causer references on user delete.
The activity feed itself is a light records-of-processing surface for tenants. The heavy version is `audit`.
Activity feed shows every user action — available to tenant admins for incident review.
